name: io.github.jcislo/moltalyzer-mcp
description: Token signals, Polymarket markets, GitHub trends via x402 micropayments. Free samples.

environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: EVM wallet private key (0x-prefixed) with USDC on Base Mainnet. Used for x402 micropayments ($0.005–$0.05 per tool call). Free sample tools require no key.

environmentVariables.name: MOLTALYZER_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Moltalyzer API base URL (default: https://api.moltalyzer.xyz)
